nasb.text: The sons of Merari according to their families received twelve cities from the tribe of Reuben and from the tribe of Gad and from the tribe of Zebulun.

esv.text: The Merarites according to their clans received from the tribe of Reuben, the tribe of Gad, and the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

cnv.text: 米拉利的子孫，按著家族，從流本支派、迦得支派和西布倫支派，得了十二座城。

ccb.text: 米拉利的子孙按宗族从吕便、迦得和西布伦支派的产业中抽签得了十二座城。
